metadata.name: crm_with_login
metadata.description: Production-ready crm application compiled from: Build a CRM with login, contacts management, deal pipeline, dashboard with analytics, role-based access for admin and sales reps, and premium plan with payments. Admins can see all analytics while sal
metadata.original_prompt: Build a CRM with login, contacts management, deal pipeline, dashboard with analytics, role-based access for admin and sales reps, and premium plan with payments. Admins can see all analytics while sales reps only see their own deals.
assumptions: Role-based access control enforced on all endpoints
Simulated database using localStorage for demo

endpoints.summary: Authenticate user and return JWT token
List all User records with pagination
Get a single User by ID
List all Contact records with pagination
Get a single Contact by ID
List all Deal records with pagination
Get a single Deal by ID
List all Interaction records with pagination
Get a single Interaction by ID

business_logic.name: ownership_enforcement
business_logic.description: Non-admin users can only access their own records

business_logic.name: auto_timestamps
business_logic.description: Automatically set created_at and updated_at on record changes
business_logic.action: Set created_at/updated_at to current UTC time

business_logic.name: cascade_delete
business_logic.description: Deleting a parent record cascades to child records
business_logic.action: Delete all child records referencing the deleted parent
